title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
